action_plan.recommended_change: Reduce Manual Keywords from $30 to $12/day, Close Automatic from $15 to $8/day. Total: $20/day (was $45/day).
action_plan.rationale: 3 consecutive weeks of 100% wasted ad spend. Lifetime ACoS now 116.98% (spend $386 > sales $330). Budget cut recommended since 2026-04-04 — still NOT confirmed actioned. Every day of delay costs ~$10-15 in pure waste.

one_action_this_week.action: IMMEDIATELY cut Campaign Manager budgets to $20/day total ($12 manual, $8 auto). This recommendation is now 2 days old and still not confirmed actioned. Each day of delay costs ~$10-15 in pure waste.
one_action_this_week.rationale: Lifetime ACoS now estimated at 117% — spending more on ads than making in ad-attributed sales. Even with organic sales improving (1 unit today), ad spend is destroying profitability. Cutting budgets is the single highest-leverage action available.
